programmes.show_description: Gedling House Of Cricket. The team of paranormal experts have been called in to investigate a 19th century town house with a celebrated but unsettling past. S2, Ep10
Ghost Of Grandad. The team are called in to investigate a house in Nottingham. The owners believe the house is haunted by multiple spirits, both malevolent and protective. S2, Ep11
Teleshopping.
Back To Basics. With his new shop opening to the public, Drew needs more stock than ever. He spots a '60s Danish sofa in Malvern and a pair of tapestries in Welshpool. S12, Ep2
The X Factor. Drew seeks standout items to lure more customers to his shop. In Derbyshire, he finds a Regency picture frame, and buys a pair of Danish rattan chairs in Harrogate. S12, Ep3
Gaby Roslin helps dancer Camilla Dallerup and her soap star fiancé Kevin Sacre find their dream holiday home. They have £500,000 to spend on a home in North Devon. S2, Ep1
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep27
Taking Risks. Drew's business has expanded so he needs twice as many items! He visits a quirky house in Suffolk, to discover a barn full of salvage from around the globe. S12, Ep5
Moving With The Times. When other businesses move with the times, Drew sees a chance to buy their unwanted stuff. In Essex, he finds a rare 1930s desk from a closing department store. S12, Ep6
Belgium. Drew is in Belgium on a continental buying adventure. He visits the flea market in Tongeren and meets a renowned dealer who lives in a huge chateau. S12, Ep7
Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst continue their road trip in Lyndhurst. Tim considers buying a beautiful plinth, while Catherine eyes four mini camels. S19, Ep7
Antiques experts Tim Medhurst and Catherine Southon search for interesting items in St Albans. Who will make the most profit at the auction in Bushey? S19, Ep8
Silversmith Brenton brings the shine back to a precious Persian tea set. Metal worker Dominic and master saddler Suzie revive a pair of Victorian roller skates. S6, Ep25
Deals for New Wheels. A retired antique dealer asks Irita to sell her treasures to help buy a car. And a grieving widower must face parting with his late wife's collection. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit the case of an ex-Premiership footballer and his birth mother. S7, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit families they helped reunite to find out what has happened since and how their lives have been transformed. S5, Ep1
Clocked & Loaded Auction. Angus helps a roofer-turned-artist sell his sculptures for a small fortune. Plus, a woman is auctioning off her inherited clock collection. S6, Ep4
Heavy Metal Sputnik. Angus helps two grieving families. Satellite-themed cup-holders and a huge gold ring do well, but a haul of hard rock albums gets everyone spinning. S6, Ep5
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep14
Hopkins Dining Parlour. Jordyn and Johnny investigate a notoriously haunted diner. They sense the presence of ghosts chasing them up and down the stairs. S2, Ep11
The Winsford Soul Tapper. Sadie has completely changed since she visited a dark witch. The team discovers a disturbing practice called Soul Tapping could be to blame. S6, Ep5
Calverton. The team investigate reports of paranormal activity in a pub in Calverton, but soon learn that strange phenomena are happening all over the historic village. S2, Ep12
A Sinister Attachment. Daniel and Claire believe renovations on their home have stirred a residual energy. The team investigate whether Claire has a demonic attachment. S3, Ep1
The Grey Lady Of Sinai. When Kate asks for help with her 14th century hunting lodge, the team discover a mind-blowing theory and the sinister story of a murdered woman. S3, Ep2
Teleshopping.

Gaby Roslin helps punk-pop princess Toyah Willcox search for a second home in the leafy London area of Richmond upon Thames. She has £650,000 to spend. S2, Ep2

Holland. Drew heads to Holland where, thanks to its thriving antiques markets, he can find the kind of unique pieces he's renowned for - including his dream car, a vintage Bugatti. S12, Ep8
Drew unearths a steel corpus of Christ on the cross, and spots a divine early 19th century gothic pew. Later, he finds a set of 1950s industrial pendant lamps. S12, Ep9
In Gloucestershire, Drew finds a huge horse's head with a dealer specialising in sculptures. And, in Somerset he spots a valuable Persian rug lining a chicken shed. S12, Ep10
Tim Medhurst and Catherine Southon hunt for profitable items in Brimfield. Catherine eyes bronze swimming medals, while Tim spends big on a mule saddle. S19, Ep9
Antiques experts Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst embark on the last leg of their road trip. Who will be victorious at the final auction in Devizes? S19, Ep10
Toy restorers Julia and Amanda repair a worn and cracked 1970s puppet. Clockmaker Steve brings a Congreve rolling ball clock back to its former glory. S6, Ep26
Record-Breaking Auction. A couple have no idea how valuable their huge haul of gold coins, watches and jewellery is. And a couple have some rare masonic regalia to sell. S2, Ep3

Tongs Will Wag! Quirky items, including a secret society's ballot box, an uncle's gold tooth, and expensive kitchenware, create a buzz in the auction room. S6, Ep6
He Who Dares Sells. Angus helps an RAF hero sell a rare SAS diary to raise cash for veterans. Also, a man parts with 250 cars, hoping to fund the cruise of a lifetime. S6, Ep7

Fix This Rotted Rancher. Dave and Jenny take on a reno close to home, but devastating structural rot threatens the entire plan - and there's a heartbreaking personal loss. S7, Ep9
The Wedding. An engaged couple update a mid-century home for their blended family, but setbacks have Ben and Erin racing to finish before the wedding. S9, Ep2
The Ghost Of Gertie. The Bull Hotel dates back to the 14th century and is said to be a hotbed of paranormal activity. The team investigate a child spirit that's been scaring staff. S3, Ep3
